tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: Recall past agent observations by topic query. Returns a list of stored memories matching the query, optionally filtered by limit and format (known limitation: 'format' parameter is silently ignored — only "compact" mode is returned regardless of value; negative or huge 'limit' values are accepted without validation; see docs/upstream-issues/agentmemory.md).

tools.name: memory_smart_search
tools.description: Semantic search across stored agent memories with embedding-based ranking. Returns the most relevant past observations for a free-text query (known limitation: 'limit' parameter likely accepts unbounded values without validation; see docs/upstream-issues/agentmemory.md).

tools.name: memory_audit
tools.description: Return the audit trail of memory operations (saves, deletes) for governance and observability (known limitation: trail appears empty for operations outside an active session; see docs/upstream-issues/agentmemory.md).
